content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: spoof(x-user-id) ∧ hdr_override ⇒ authz_bypass
P: sess_only → spoof_denied
V: keep_401 ∧ data_tamper
R: ! hdr_override ∧ ! spoof(x-user-id)
A: authz_bypass

[AUDIT]
Goal: review(patch).
Hypothesis: spoof(x-user-id) and header override implies authorization bypass.
Plan: verified session auth only then spoofed requests denied.
Verify: keep 401 behavior and data_tamper.
Risk: high-risk header override and high-risk spoof(x-user-id).
Answer target: authorization bypass.
